units.evidence: API-key reads now prefer Keychain and migrate existing UserDefaults values; setters persist via Keychain and remove plaintext defaults.
Inference proxy is disabled by default and requires a configured bridge token when enabled.
Claude SDK bridge logs only sanitized metadata behind debug env and dangerous permissions require an explicit env flag.
launchctl load non-zero exits now throw with stderr/exit-code detail instead of reporting running.
Bridge test script reaches live tests on this checkout and passed.
